args:
Use Codex internal Image Gen only for exactly one Seolleyeon AI profile asset.
Do not use OpenAI Image API. Do not use Batch API. Do not require OPENAI_API_KEY.
Do not modify CLIP/SVD/KNN/RRF recommender files or any recommender pipeline code.
Generate exactly one image, then stop. Do not continue to the next asset. Do not run QA.
Do not recover, copy, move, rename, or import generated files; the parent bounded executor owns recovery and file QA after this call.

Output geometry requirement:
- Generate a portrait image close to 2:3 aspect ratio, ideally 1024x1536.
- Do not create an ultra-tall, panoramic, square, or heavily cropped image.
- The recovered file must satisfy vertical profile file QA aspect ratio checks.

Single asset to generate:
assetId: female_002__face_card__v001
profileId: female_002
gender: female
numericId: 002
shotType: face_card
targetFaceType: None
targetLooksLevelBand: None
attempt: 1
promptHash: df41e3ebfac514714abe2604
expectedRawPath: C:/Users/samsung/StudioProjects/semisemifinal/ai_image/raw/female_002__face_card__v001__attempt01.png
expectedFinalPath: C:/Users/samsung/StudioProjects/semisemifinal/ai_image/female/002/face_card.png

Generation prompt:
Generate exactly one vertical realistic smartphone profile photo.

Asset metadata:
assetId: female_002__face_card__v001
profileId: female_002
shotType: face_card

Use this prompt:
A realistic adult Korean university student, approximately 21 years old, an adult woman, natural everyday profile photo, not a celebrity, not an influencer, authentic campus-based relationship profile style, calm and trustworthy impression.

Face details:
slightly narrow eyes, a refined face line, a subtle chic expression, a clean medium nose bridge, soft oval face shape, medium-sized eyes, slightly lifted outer eye corners, soft jawline, moderate cheek fullness, medium-high nose bridge, natural medium lips, natural brows, natural skin texture, noticeably attractive but still realistic, refined natural grooming, not celebrity-like, not a photoshoot model, quiet romantic but mature mood.

Hair and styling:
medium-length, natural dark brown, slightly wavy hair with light natural bangs, light natural makeup, intellectual neat campus fashion, neat regular fit, campus-appropriate and modest. Outfit: minimal navy knit top with a calm campus mood.

Composition:
head-and-shoulders portrait, face clearly visible, looking near the camera with a natural relaxed expression, simple warm off-white or campus-neutral background, not a studio portrait.

Lighting and camera:
soft natural daylight, realistic smartphone camera photo, 35mm equivalent lens, slight depth of field, natural skin texture, highly realistic but casual.

Avoid: childlike appearance, teenager, school uniform, idol trainee look, celebrity lookalike, influencer photoshoot, glamour studio lighting, heavy retouching, plastic skin, exaggerated beauty filter, revealing outfit, swimsuit, lingerie, nightclub, party scene, neon lighting, sexualized pose, luxury hotel background, identifiable school logo, visible real university name, text, watermark, distorted face, distorted hands, extra fingers, unrealistic body proportions.

Rules:
- one image only
- no text in image
- no watermark
- no logo
- adult Korean university student
- realistic, calm, trustworthy
- not influencer-like
- not school uniform
- not childlike
